recipe.title: Homemade kebabs & flatbreads
recipe.description: Try this easy recipe for how to make meat-reduced kebabs and flatbreads from scratch. With salad and yoghurt, this is a lovely meal for 4.

ingredients.name: mixed crunchy veg
ingredients.note: such as red onion, cabbage, onion, baby gem, radishes, broccoli stalks, cucumber

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh mint

steps.descr: Drain the chickpeas and blitz half in a food processor...
steps.instructions: Drain the chickpeas and blitz half in a food processor with the fruit and nuts, garam masala and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then crack in the egg, add the mince and pulse until combined.

on_enter.say: Drain the chickpeas and blitz half in a food processor with the fruit and nuts, garam masala and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then crack in the egg, add the mince and pulse until combined.

steps.descr: Divide the mixture into 4 equal-sized pieces on a piece...
steps.instructions: Divide the mixture into 4 equal-sized pieces on a piece of greaseproof, shape into koftas (about 20cm in length), and use your fingertips to leave dents in the surface to increase the gnarly bits as they cook.

on_enter.say: Divide the mixture into 4 equal-sized pieces on a piece of greaseproof, shape into koftas (about 20cm in length), and use your fingertips to leave dents in the surface to increase the gnarly bits as they cook.

steps.descr: Lay them across an oiled tray and grill for 10 minutes,...
steps.instructions: Lay them across an oiled tray and grill for 10 minutes, or until golden, gnarly and cooked through, turning halfway, then remove to a board to rest.

on_enter.say: Lay them across an oiled tray and grill for 10 minutes, or until golden, gnarly and cooked through, turning halfway, then remove to a board to rest.

steps.descr: For the flatbreads, pile the flour onto a clean work...
steps.instructions: For the flatbreads, pile the flour onto a clean work surface, make a well in the centre, add a pinch of salt, 150ml of water and 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Use a fork to bring it together, then knead into a smooth dough. Divide the dough into 4 pieces, roll into even-sized rounds (around 18-20cm) on a flour-dusted surface, cover with a clean damp tea towel and put aside while you make the chopped salad.

on_enter.say: For the flatbreads, pile the flour onto a clean work surface, make a well in the centre, add a pinch of salt, 150ml of water and 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Use a fork to bring it together, then knead into a smooth dough. Divide the dough into 4 pieces, roll into even-sized rounds (around 18-20cm) on a flour-dusted surface, cover with a clean damp tea towel and put aside while you make the chopped salad.

steps.descr: Prep the mixed crunchy veg, then finely chop it all on a...
steps.instructions: Prep the mixed crunchy veg, then finely chop it all on a large board. Make a well in the middle, add the mustard and vinegar, 2 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil and mix together. Toss the salad into the dressing, then taste and season to perfection.

on_enter.say: Prep the mixed crunchy veg, then finely chop it all on a large board. Make a well in the middle, add the mustard and vinegar, 2 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil and mix together. Toss the salad into the dressing, then taste and season to perfection.

steps.descr: Ripple the yoghurt with the chilli oil in a small bowl...
steps.instructions: Ripple the yoghurt with the chilli oil in a small bowl with a pinch of salt and pepper.

on_enter.say: Ripple the yoghurt with the chilli oil in a small bowl with a pinch of salt and pepper.

steps.descr: Place a large non-stick frying pan on a low heat and...
steps.instructions: Place a large non-stick frying pan on a low heat and cook the flatbreads one at a time for 2 minutes, until puffed up and golden, turning halfway and stacking them up in a tea towel as you go to keep warm.

on_enter.say: Place a large non-stick frying pan on a low heat and cook the flatbreads one at a time for 2 minutes, until puffed up and golden, turning halfway and stacking them up in a tea towel as you go to keep warm.

steps.descr: When you’re ready to eat, transfer the chopped salad to...
steps.instructions: When you’re ready to eat, transfer the chopped salad to a serving platter (or keep it on the large board, if you like). Scatter over the remaining chickpeas, sprinkle with a pinch of garam masala and tear over the mint leaves. Lay over the kebabs, dollop over the chilli-rippled yoghurt, scatter over the reserved baby mint leaves and serve with the warm flatbreads.

on_enter.say: When you’re ready to eat, transfer the chopped salad to a serving platter (or keep it on the large board, if you like). Scatter over the remaining chickpeas, sprinkle with a pinch of garam masala and tear over the mint leaves. Lay over the kebabs, dollop over the chilli-rippled yoghurt, scatter over the reserved baby mint leaves and serve with the warm flatbreads.
